title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people taking a dance class. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A group of young people are taking a dance class in a studio. They are standing in a line and following the teacher's movements. There is a large mirror and wooden floor in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people helping in the kitchen. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A little boy is helping his grandmother in the kitchen. They are standing at a table and making sandwiches together. There are plates, tomatoes, cheese and bread in front of them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
